key_decisions: 3 FE bugs found+fixed live this session, ALL in js/services/downloadService.js + js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiModelManager/MpiModelManager.js, ALL UNCOMMITTED. (1) Detail-footer STOMP on uninstall->immediate-reinstall: download:started fires twice (client + SSE echo); a download:snapshot in the gap dropped the optimistically-'downloading' client job (snapshot only preserved 'pending'), so the SSE started-echo found job=undefined and openDetail painted Install. Fix: snapshot preserves 'pending'+'downloading' client jobs absent from snapshot; SSE started-echo re-emits Events only when the FE holds the job. (2) Reload didn't repaint grid: download:snapshot SSE handler mutated state.downloadJobs but emitted no Events signal, and MpiModelManager had no listener (state:changed filtered to s_installedModelIds). Fix: snapshot handler emits Events.emit('download:snapshot'); MpiModelManager listens -> sig-guarded renderList(). (3) Missed-terminal at 99%: download completed during the reload SSE-reconnect gap, terminal download:complete lost, card stuck 99% until manual refresh; reconciler idles once store job is terminal. Fix: MpiModelManager _pumpBackstop — while any active job, 5s quiet awaitReSync({quiet:true}) self-corrects against disk truth, self-idles when none. awaitReSync gained a quiet flag to suppress the refresh spinner.

REAL USERS CANNOT RELOAD THE APP (Ctrl+R blocked; user reloaded via DevTools location.reload for the test). So the reload-at-completion race is dev-only; the _pumpBackstop belt still earns its place for ANY SSE gap (network blip / sleep) but is not a common-path bug. This reframes row 6 severity.

6 failing tests are pre-existing (git log proves last-touched by MPI-242/244/90) + download-completion.test.cjs is the known cancel-only resumeFromFile dead test — NONE are MPI-276 regressions. Do not 'fix' them under MPI-276; download-completion resume-dead prune is a separate deferred cleanup.

Peer session uninstall-ux-cleanup committed 987cd539: removed the dead 'Also delete model files from disk' checkbox; uninstall now ALWAYS passes deleteFiles=true. Backend deleteFiles wire untouched (still accepts the param). Affects row 5 (no keep-files option). Message resolved.
constraints: Phase 8 is user-ux — agent MUST NOT self-approve cards. Run automated checks, user judges live UI. Port 3000 user-owned; never kill their app; coordinate restarts.

Shared tree: NEVER git add . / -A. Commit the 2 FE files by explicit pathspec, git commit -n. Unrelated dirty tree (.impeccable/, DESIGN.md, PRODUCT.md, other kanban, comfy_workflows) is NOT MPI-276 — leave it. Peer may hold unstaged hunks in MpiModelManager.js — stage by content anchor if so (feedback_shared_tree_commit_hygiene).
refCount is DELETED (G5). Liveness = store status / _inFlightDepIds. Never reintroduce.
G4 preserve-verbatim: NDH cancel-only (never pause/resume), .cubricdl, sha256 verify, shared-dep whole-model guard, wrapper endpoint signatures + SSE event names.

The 3 fixes are FE-only (no backend/route/signature change). downloadService.js snapshot listener + started-echo guard; MpiModelManager download:snapshot listener + _pumpBackstop + awaitReSync quiet flag.

Row 3 blocker: user can't drop network (concurrent agent session) and reload is blocked for real users. To run row 3 either the user frees network briefly, or the agent stops ONLY the :3000 server process (verify it's separable from Electron first).

resume_prompt: You are resuming MPI-276 Phase 8 (user-ux validation matrix) on branch 1.2.0. Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/555b46e7-1160-4253-b4e5-b1944b45211a.json then run mpi-continue. The automated rail PASSED (lint 0 errors; all MPI-276 test suites green; the 6 failing tests are pre-existing dead/stale owned by other cards, NOT regressions). Three FE bugs were found live and fixed this session, ALL UNCOMMITTED in js/services/downloadService.js + js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiModelManager/MpiModelManager.js: (1) detail-footer stomped to Install on uninstall->immediate-reinstall (snapshot dropped the optimistic 'downloading' client job; fixed by preserving pending+downloading client jobs and guarding the SSE started-echo), (2) reload mid-download didn't repaint the grid (snapshot mutated state silently; fixed by emitting a download:snapshot Events signal + a MpiModelManager listener), (3) a completed download whose terminal SSE event was lost in the reload reconnect gap stuck the card at 99% (fixed by a _pumpBackstop 5s quiet awaitReSync while any job is active). Rows 2 (local install), 4 (cancel), 6 (reload restore) PASS. REMAINING live rows: 1 cold-boot phantom (needs a fresh app start), 3 swallowed-request drill (needs network-off or the :3000 server stopped — the user could NOT do either last session and real users can't reload the app, so coordinate), 5 uninstall matrix (note: a peer commit 987cd539 removed the 'Also delete model files' checkbox so uninstall now always deletes files), 7 remote Pod pass (user connects a Pod that boot-fetches wrapper 0.2.37; confirm hot-store evict + pipPins in the wrapper log; no local state mutated by remote events), 8 the user's phantom-free churn verdict. Port 3000 is user-owned — never kill their app; coordinate restarts. On all-pass: COMMIT the 2 dirty FE files by EXPLICIT PATHSPEC (never git add .; git commit -n), move MPI-276 doing->done, run mpi-end (which appends 'refCount DELETED in MPI-276' to memory, drops MPI-276 from the in-flight list, notes MPI-123-local closure). validation.md already logs the rail + rows 2/4/6 + all 3 fixes.
